creator: FreeBSD_Bugs@jhorland.com
text:
This is an upgraded system, upgraded a few times over the years.

There are no un-upgraded ports.

Usr-land is clean of all prior installs, with the exception of a few symlinks.

Clam-AV is the last install.

There were residual copies of clam-related libraries in /usr/local/lib.

The leftover files were from clamav-0.95.2, not removed by make deinstall.

Removing these files has cleared the issue.

The port has compiled and installed cleanly.

Please feel free to close this report.
